decision: D7 spec-gate, adopted by Anthony 2026-06-12 (both wirings: --check audit + post-write hook advisory)
exempt_note: Intake mouths (workspace root, docs/research incl. intake_raw), docs/agent-memory, .agent-surface, tests, caches are NEVER gated — continuation/seed artifacts are pre-spec by definition.
